name: Tofu and Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Water or unseasoned veggie broth
1-2 tsp Cayenne or your favorite hot sauce (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, blend together all ingredients until smooth and creamy.
2. If the sauce is too thick, add a little extra water.
3. Pour the sauce into a skillet or saucepan and stir over medium heat until it is thoroughly heated.
4. Serve over grains such as buckwheat, millet, or rice, or over pasta.
